ddls:
CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the circuit */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the circuit */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date the circuit was designed */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the circuit design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circuits_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., input, output, internal) */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X-coordinate of the node */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_attributes_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing path */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the path belongs to */,
  "start_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting node of the path */,
  "end_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending node of the path */,
  "path_type" TEXT /* Type of the path (e.g., setup, hold, clock-to-output) */,
  "slack" REAL /* Slack of the timing path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_paths_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_paths_end_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_paths_start_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_path_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing path the segment belongs to */,
  "start_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting node of the segment */,
  "end_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending node of the segment */,
  "segment_delay" REAL /* Delay of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_path_segments_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES timing_paths ("path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing constraint */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the constraint belongs to */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint (e.g., clock skew, jitter) */,
  "constraint_value" REAL /* Value of the constraint */,
  "constraint_description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_constraints_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the signal belongs to */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the signal (e.g., clock, data) */,
  "signal_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal the transition belongs to */,
  "transition_type" TEXT /* Type of the transition (e.g., rising, falling) */,
  "transition_time" REAL /* Time of the transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_transitions_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clock_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clock domain */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the domain belongs to */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the clock domain */,
  "domain_type" TEXT /* Type of the clock domain (e.g., single, multiple) */,
  "domain_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the clock domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clock_domains_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the circuit the result belongs to */,
  "path_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing path the result is for */,
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing constraint the result is for */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_path_id FOREIGN KEY ("path_id") REFERENCES timing_paths ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_constraint_id FOREIGN KEY ("constraint_id") REFERENCES timing_constraints ("constraint_id")
)
